commands.why: Store content-addressed artifact metadata and payload (bytes, text, or structured packet JSON).
Resolve immutable artifact metadata referenced from timelines and packets.
Search and filter immutable artifacts across the workspace.
Create a first-class card and attach it to a board.
Resolve a card through its board membership context.
List cards on one board in canonical order.
Create a durable board over topics and cards.
Resolve canonical board state and summary.
Scan durable coordination boards and lightweight summaries.
Update board metadata with optimistic concurrency.
Load the operator-facing board workspace with cards, docs, and inbox sections.
commands.output_envelope: Returns `{ board_id, board, primary_topic, cards, documents, inbox, board_summary, projection_freshness, board_summary_freshness, warnings, section_kinds, generated_at }`.

commands.why: Reposition a card within a board column using the card's first-class identity.
Create a first-class card and attach it to a board.
Resolve a card through its board membership context.
List cards on one board in canonical order.
Soft-delete a first-class card by setting archived_at (board concurrency via if_board_updated_at).
Resolve one first-class card by id.
Scan first-class card resources across boards.
Reposition a card within a board column using the card's first-class identity.
Update card fields, including resolution and resolution refs.
Permanently delete an archived card (human-gated; requires archived_at).
Clear archived_at on a soft-deleted card so it reappears on boards.
Load chronological evidence and related resources for one card.
commands.output_envelope: Returns `{ card, events, artifacts, cards, documents, threads }`.

commands.why: Check compatibility between clients and core before writes.
Update board metadata with optimistic concurrency.
Update card fields, including resolution and resolution refs.
Update topic state with provenance and optimistic concurrency.
Create a canonical document lineage anchored to a typed subject ref.
Resolve a document lineage and its current head revision.
Scan canonical document lineages.
Append a new immutable revision and advance the document head.
Resolve one immutable document revision.
Enumerate immutable revisions for one document lineage.
Append an event that links first-class resources and evidence through typed refs.
Inspect append-only event history across the workspace.
Record structured delivery evidence anchored by `subject_ref`.
Record a structured review over a receipt anchored to the same card as subject_ref.
Probe whether the core process is alive.
Verify storage and projection subsystems are ready for traffic.
commands.output_envelope: Returns `{ ok: true }` when the workspace is ready.

commands.why: Suppress or clear a derived inbox item via a durable acknowledgment event.
Load the derived operator inbox generated from refs and canonical events.
Load a compact coordination bundle (thread, recent events, key artifacts, cards, documents) for inspection and triage.
commands.output_envelope: Returns `{ thread, recent_events, key_artifacts, open_cards, documents }` plus forward-compatible fields.

commands.why: Read-only diagnostic projection that bundles context, inbox, and related-thread signals for one backing thread. Prefer topics.workspace for normal operator coordination when a topic exists.

commands.summary: Get topic workspace (primary operator coordination read)
commands.why: Primary operator coordination read — load the topic workspace composed from linked cards, docs, backing threads, and inbox items. Prefer this over thread workspace for triage and planning.
commands.output_envelope: Returns `{ topic, cards, boards, documents, threads, inbox, projection_freshness, generated_at }`.
